summary: Added classifyPCGSEnvelope helper + wired into resolveRead so HTTP 200 + IsValidRequest=false surfaces as usageErr (exit 2), No data found surfaces as notFoundErr (exit 3), and the images-endpoint heuristic catches bogus certs.
reason: PCGS uses HTTP 200 + envelope to communicate both classes of expected failure. Without this classifier the CLI exits 0 on bad input and the typed exit codes promised in help text and SKILL.md are a lie. Surfaced during Phase 5 live dogfood when 8 error_path tests failed with exit 0 against a real PCGS rejection.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood 121/121 PASS, scorecard 87/100 Grade A
